description: Style Note If it's unending speed you're looking for, there's no better running shoe than the nike Free 3.0 V4. A perfect cross-country shoe, the Free Run is employed with DriFit technology that allows water to drain away, keeping your feet dry and comfortable even in wet conditions Product Details One-piece, single-layer fabric upper for lightweight comfort and breathability with mesh inlays Allows water to drain away keeping the feet dry and fresh even in wet conditions Internal arch bandage locks down the foot offering a snug, secure Fit and optimal power transfer Collar lobes provide a snug fit for ultimate heel lock down No-sew construction and eyestays limit internal stitching to reduce friction and foot irritation Removable cushioned footbed to accommodate an orthotic EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Unique tip to heel Nike Free TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs for optimal traction on various surfaces Vertical and horizontal flex grooves and waffle patterned lugs for added cushioning and flexibility while running Material and Care Mesh Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
